name: Red Pepper Hummus Pockets
recipeIngredient: 2 cups cooked chickpeas, drained & rinsed (19 oz. can Garbanzo Beans or Chick Peas)
1/3 cup roasted red peppers, drained (7.25 oz. jar)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor bowl with metal blade, combine chickpeas, lemon juice, oil, and garlic.
Process for 1 or 2 minutes, or until smooth.
2. Add roasted peppers.
Process for 30 - 60 seconds, or until peppers are finely chopped.
3. To assemble sandwiches, place lettuce leaf and cucumber slices in each pita bread half.
4. Spoon about 3 tablespoons hummus into each pocket.
5. Make 8 sandwiches (4 servings).
